content:
# 3D Geological Modeling

**Summary**: The creation of 3D models to represent the subsurface geology and structure.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] developed a 3D subsurface geological model for Al-Hassa using integrated geophysical data.

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] used 3d-modeling in Petrel to construct a 3D geocellular model of the Moki Formation.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] ['fracture mapping', 'geophysical inversion', 'data integration']

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] used 3d-modeling in Petrel to construct a 3D geocellular model of the Moki Formation.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] ['MT', 'TEM', 'Gravity', 'DOM']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The 3D modeling revealed complex underground structures, including potential salt domes and fracture zones. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 20]])

- The 3D model provided a robust foundation for understanding reservoir architecture and fault systems. ([[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024, p. 40]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] Integrating multiple data types into a coherent model in complex areas.
